title: UGV Environmental Data Acquisition System
summary: A proposed UGV architecture for environmental data acquisition using LiDAR, IMU, and GPS/GNSS.
highlights: Defined system inputs, outputs, operating environment, and project timeline.
Simulated encoder and PID control systems with Python, NumPy, SciPy, and Matplotlib.
Studied ROS 2 on Ubuntu for future sensor processing and robot development.

title: Temperature and Humidity Monitoring with PLC
summary: A monitoring system using an ES35-SW sensor, RS485 Modbus RTU, Siemens S7-1200 PLC, and C# WinForms.
highlights: Programmed TIA Portal logic to read Modbus registers and process sensor data.
Built real-time charts, alarms, connection status, and Excel data export.
Integrated START/STOP, CONNECT/DISCONNECT, and monitoring workflows.

title: STM32-PC Communication via RS232
summary: STM32 to PC communication via RS232/UART for data transmission, device control, and hardware testing.
highlights: Integrated EEPROM storage, SPI OLED display, and aging test logic.
Validated embedded data exchange and device control behavior.
